title: Department of Speech and Language Therapy Master Program Application and Fees
content:
Department of Speech and Language Therapy Master Program Application and Fees

2025-2026 Spring Semester online application deadline: December 15, 2025

Application Deadline: Sunday, January 25, 2026

Results Announcement Date: Wednesday, January 28, 2026

Main List Registration Deadlines: January 28 - February 4, 2026

Reserve List Registration Deadlines: February 5 - 13, 2026

Click for Online Pre-Registration Link

ALES Score Type: NUMERICAL (SAY)

Dear candidate students;

There will be no science exam in our Thesis/Non-Thesis Master's Programs;

1) In our thesis programs, 65% of the ALES in the numerical score type, 35% of the undergraduate graduation grade point average

2) In the non-thesis program, 50% of the undergraduate graduation grade, if any* 50% of the ALES in the relevant score type will be taken into consideration.

*(If the candidates applying to the non-thesis programs do not have an ALES score, it will be included in the evaluation as 55 points.)

The applications of the candidates who do not apply online, who are not in a graduate status at the time of application, and who do not upload their ALES document and identity information to the application system during the application will be considered invalid.

APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS FOR THE THESIS-BASED MASTER'S PROGRAM IN SPEECH AND LANGUAGE THERAPY:

Graduation Requirement:

Only graduates of Bachelor's and/or Non-Thesis Master's Programs in Speech and Language Therapy from universities can apply to this program.

APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS FOR THE NON-THESIS MASTER'S PROGRAM IN SPEECH AND LANGUAGE THERAPY:

Graduation Requirement: Only graduates of Bachelor's programs in Speech and Language Therapy from universities can apply to this program.

Applications from outside the field will not be accepted for the Speech and Language Therapy Master's Program.

- Original or certified copy of undergraduate diploma

- Original or certified copy of undergraduate transcript

-ALES result document (Taken within the last five years, 55 points or more in numbers)

-Copy of identity card

-Photo (2 Pieces)

-ALES result document for thesis program applications;

At least 55 points in numerical field

-Applicants will be selected in order of success.

TUITION FEES:
